name: Wand of Paralysis
description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can take a Magic action to expend 1 charge to cause a thin blue ray to streak from the tip toward a creature you can see within 60 feet of yourself.

paralysis.effect: Thin blue ray from wand tip

regaining_charges.on_roll_1: Wand crumbles into ashes and is destroyed
